allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''multer''\); const u = m\({ storage: m.memoryStorage\(\) }\); console.log\(''OK''\)")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \('netstat -ano ^| findstr :3000 ^| findstr LISTENING'\) do taskkill /F /PID %a")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 22128 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }")
